title: Tauragė、Tauragė County — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Tauragė、Tauragė Countyの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

TauragėはTauragė Countyにある人口22,000の都市です。A city in western Lithuania near the Russian exclave of Kaliningrad, known for its castle, the Jūra River, and a growing manufacturing sector.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
